display_name: MOMENTUM-continuation shadow (#4.3): the strongest DECORRELATED lead from the broad sweep (+14pp WR, both regimes; 100% of momentum candidates are blocked by the dip-filter stack). momentum_mode bypasses the dip filters+triggers and enters on pc_h1>=20 AND pct_above_vwap_h24<=20 (no blow-off chase) AND 1m_volume_spike>=0.40 (freshness).
